title: erodium cicutarium var. subalbidum
intro: Erodium cicutarium var. subalbidum, also known as redstem storksbill, is a variety of the Erodium cicutarium plant, a flowering plant in the geranium family native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Erodium cicutarium var. subalbidum include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a valuable herb for various health concerns. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, allowing for various ways to harness its medicinal properties.
